MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Joyce Long.
Crystal G. Howard, Esq. for Plaintiff: Gary Boggs, was present. No appearance by plaintiff. Order waiving live testimony in file.
Margaret F. Mahaffey, Esq. for Defendant: Thomas Dee Engineering Co., Inc., was present. No appearance by Defendant.
Parties stipulated for continuance, pending payment of settlement check. Matter was continued to April 13, 2006.
